title: physalis × elliottii var. glabra
intro: Physalis × elliottii var. glabra, also known as the glabrous ground cherry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the nightshade family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming Physalis × elliottii var. glabra has been associated with various health benefits, including reduced risk of cardiovascular disease, improved cognitive function, and enhanced immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
